backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing user profiles, onboarding state, recommendations stub, and shortlist management with access control checks.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping features to related frontend files, components, and requirements with confidence metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of various frontend files including components, hooks, services, and data modules.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration defining theme variables and base styles for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app and loads main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes and wraps the app with ThemeProvider and Toaster notifications.
Login/logout button using Internet Identity with loading states and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/discover/Discove: Empty-state component shown when all swipe cards are exhausted, offering reset and preference adjustment actions.
frontend/src/components/discover/Neighbo: Visual card displaying neighbourhood image, name, commute note, rent info, description, and tags.
frontend/src/components/discover/SwipeDe: Implements a swipeable deck for neighbourhood cards with drag gestures and like/dislike callbacks.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppHeader: Renders the top header with logo and link to the home route.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Defines the main app layout with header, routed content, and bottom navigation.
frontend/src/components/layout/BottomNav: Displays a fixed bottom navigation bar with route links and active-state icons.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Onboa: Shows onboarding intro text and embeds the PreferencesEditor for saving renter preferences.
frontend/src/components/profile/Preferen: Form component for editing renter preferences including budget, commute, and lifestyle tags.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileS: Modal dialog for initial profile creation, collecting the user's name and saving via mutation.
frontend/src/components/shortlist/Shortl: Displays saved neighbourhood cards with basic info and an option to remove items from the shortlist.
frontend/src/data/neighbourhoodCatalog.t: Exports a static list of Nairobi neighbourhood objects with descriptions, rent ranges, and tags.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and hooks for managing Internet Identity login, loading stored identities, and tracking authentication status.
frontend/src/hooks/usePreferences.ts: Fetches, saves, and caches renter preferences and onboarding state using backend actors and local storage.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines queries and mutations for loading and saving the caller's user profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useShortlist.ts: Manages shortlist and swipe history using storage, providing queries and mutations for likes, removals, and clearing swipes.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind setup defining light/dark theme variables and base styling rules.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentity providers.
frontend/src/pages/DiscoverPage.tsx: Displays swipe-based neighbourhood recommendations, redirecting users to onboarding if incomplete.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: Shows onboarding form and saves renter preferences before navigating to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePreferencesPag: Displays account info, profile setup, and preference editing, handling authentication and profile state.
frontend/src/pages/ShortlistPage.tsx: Shows the user's shortlist and allows removal of saved neighbourhoods.
frontend/src/services/preferencesStorage: Handles loading and saving renter preferences and onboarding flags using backend actors and local storage as fallback.
frontend/src/services/recommendations.ts: Scores neighbourhoods against renter preferences and returns a sorted recommendation list.
frontend/src/services/swipeStorage.ts: Handles storing likes/dislikes locally or via backend actor, including retrieval and clearing of swipe data.
frontend/src/types/neighbourhood.ts: Defines the Neighbourhood interface with rent, commute, tags, and image fields.
frontend/src/types/preferences.ts: Defines renter preference data structures and onboarding completion state.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters with sessionStorage support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind theme extensions, colors, animations, and plugins for the frontend.
project_state.json: Describes the project’s state, goals, features, and metadata for the VibeLoc MVP.
